value: Hi there! Thank you for reaching out. We understand your concern about unexpected services on your lines. We've noted your request to deactivate any data bundles or services on both 08051148842 and 09052236815. To process this promptly and ensure we're removing the correct services from your account, could you please confirm whether you're seeing charges on your bill or receiving service notifications for these lines? In the meantime, we're looking into your account and will follow up with you shortly. We appreciate your patience.
